projects.title: Brand Incorporation — The Legend of Wong & MaMa Zainab
projects.logline: An exiled warrior arrives in Egypt, and an AI tells him to build a comfort-food empire named after every Egyptian's mother.
projects.synopsis: Cinematic ~3:30 launch film tracing Shang Hong Wong's flight from a neon-soaked underworld to Alexandria, where he forges the MaMa Zainab brand under the guidance of an AI oracle and a phantom army of 'Falaha' village mothers.
projects.script:
This is the full, cinematic script for **"Mama Zainab"** spanning from the neon-lit chaos of Shang Hong Wong’s past to the golden shores of Alexandria.

---

### **TITLE: The Great Eternal Warrior's “Stuffy Fingers” Recipe**

**SCENE 1** **EXT. NEON CITY ROOFTOP \- NIGHT (CINEMATIC/HIGH ACTION)**

Rain pours in slow-motion, catching the glare of neon signs. SHANG HONG WONG (60s, battle-scarred but elite) stands at the edge of a skyscraper. Below, a MOB of suits and street fighters \- his former associates \- swarm the building.

Wong looks at his hands, tired of the blood. He pulls out a sleek, glass-morphic smartphone.

**SHANG HONG WONG** (To the phone, voice weary) \- in chinese with arabic subs- I’m done with the war. Tell me... where is the one place on Earth where no one will look for a fighter, and the food can heal a broken soul?

**CHATGPT (V.O.)** Searching... Analysis complete. You seek peace and "Comfort Food" Go to Egypt.

Wong looks at the mob breaking through the roof door. He leaps into the shadows as the screen fades to white.

---

**SCENE 2** **EXT. ON THE TOP OF THE PYRAMIDS \- DAY (CINEMATIC/DRONE SHOT) \- Giza Skyline**

**EXT. ON THE TOP OF THE PYRAMIDS \- DAY (CINEMATIC/DRONE SHOT)**

A sweeping, 360-degree drone shot circles the apex of the Great Pyramid. The vast, dusty expanse of the Giza Skyline stretches out below, ancient and eternal under the blazing sun.

SHANG HONG WONG sits cross-legged on the massive, weathered limestone blocks. He wears his dark, silken warrior robes, perfectly still, eyes closed, meditating as the wind whips around him.

He slowly opens his eyes and raises his glass-morphic phone.

**SHANG HONG WONG** (Calm, commanding) I am in position. Tell me... what is the ultimate strike in this market? I want to build an empire, but it must be built on what the people here truly miss. The comfort of their Oriental food. And it cannot bear my name. It must be named after what their hearts desire.

**CHATGPT (V.O.)** (Crisp, analytical AI voice) Analyzing Egyptian market sentiment... Calculating cultural nostalgia vectors... Result found. The highest emotional currency in Egypt is "Original Home Food." Traditional Oriental dishes. Stuffy Fingers, Macaroni Béchamel, Mombar...

Wong's eyes narrow. The mind of the tactician is working.

**SHANG HONG WONG** Stuffy Fingers... Mahshi. A heavy, intricate dish. Tell me, machine... can we transform this ancient art into Fast Food?

**CHATGPT (V.O.)** Calculating feasibility... Of course. It is a highly disruptive model. But there is one absolute condition for victory. You cannot use professional chefs.

**SHANG HONG WONG** No professionals? Then who will wield the knives?

**CHATGPT (V.O.)** You must hire the true masters of the craft. The "Falaha." Real village women. You are attempting to compete with every mother in Egypt. No modern city mom, no culinary school graduate, will be able to compete with a true Falaha’s authenticity.

Wong nods slowly, respecting the wisdom of this strategy.

**SHANG HONG WONG** A phantom army of village mothers. Brilliant. But what do we call this empire? What name commands instant, unquestioned respect in the Egyptian mind?

**CHATGPT (V.O.)** Cross-referencing classic Arabic theater... Accessing data from the legendary play, "El Eyal Kebret." The answer is: Mama Zainab. To the Egyptian subconscious, if Mama Zainab is the cook, it is an undeniable fact that it is delicious.

Wong stands up. The wind catches his robes, making them billow like storm clouds against the bright sky.

**SHANG HONG WONG** Mama Zainab. It is decided.

**CHATGPT (V.O.)** Strategic query: Where will you launch this campaign?

**SHANG HONG WONG** (Looking out over the sprawling city) Here. In the capital. Egypt.

**CHATGPT (V.O.)** Negative. That is a tactical error. You must start from Alexandria.

Wong pauses, listening intently.

**CHATGPT (V.O.)** Alexandria holds the magic of success. The market data is clear: If you make it in Alexandria, you possess the formula to succeed anywhere in the world. But if you fail in Alexandria... you will not be able to succeed elsewhere. It is the ultimate proving ground.

Wong looks to the North, toward the invisible Mediterranean coast. A small, dangerous smile plays on his lips.

**SHANG HONG WONG** The ultimate proving ground...

He tucks the phone into his robes. He steps to the very edge of the pyramid's peak, looking hundreds of feet down.

**SHANG HONG WONG** (To himself) Time to find the first Mama Zainab.

Without a second of hesitation, Wong dives off the edge of the pyramid.

The camera rushes to the edge to follow him, but he is already gone—disappeared into the shadows and the swirling desert dust, leaving only the echo of the wind.

**CUT TO BLACK.**

---

**SCENE 3** **EXT. ALEXANDRIA \- THE GREAT PLAZA \- DAY**

Months later. The Mediterranean sun sparkles on the water. A massive stage has been erected. SHANG HONG WONG, now dressed in a premium, minimalist linen suit, stands behind a long judging table.

Tens of stoves are lined up. Tens of women from across Egypt are rolling grape leaves, and other stuffed vegetables. The air is thick with the scent of lemon, garlic, and mint.

**SHANG HONG WONG** (Into a microphone \- With Egyptian broken accent) I have traveled across the world to find the perfect roll. The one who creates the ultimate Subah Mahshi wins my life’s fortune as an investment, You will be our MaMa Zainab. Begin\!

---

**SCENE 4** **EXT. COMPETITION FLOOR \- CONTINUOUS**

MAMA ZAINAB (Kind face, plaid green and yellow apron) works with calm precision. Beside her, a WHITE GOOSE waddles, wearing a matching tiny plaid ribbon.

Suddenly, a shimmer in the air appears next to her \- the GHOST OF MAMA ZAINAB (an ethereal, younger version of herself, visible only to her and the goose).

The Goose honks. The Ghost nods.

**Action Sequence (Comedic Sabotage):**

* **The Rival:** A high-end chef next to Zainab reaches for her salt. The **Goose** trips her, causing her to dump a whole bag of sugar into the pot instead.  
* **The Mob Saboteur:** One of Wong’s old enemies, disguised as a cook, tries to tip Zainab’s table. The **Ghost** blows a cold wind, freezing the man’s hands to his own pot.  
* **The Clean Sweep:** The **Goose** flaps its wings, sending a cloud of flour into the eyes of the other top contenders just as they are about to plate.

---

**SCENE 5** **EXT. JUDGING TABLE \- LATER**

Only one plate sits before Wong: A single, perfectly cylindrical, emerald-green finger of Mahshi.

Wong picks it up. The crowd goes silent. He takes a bite. A cinematic "flavor explosion" occurs \- visions of green fields and warm kitchens flash across his eyes. He looks at Mama Zainab.

**SHANG HONG WONG** (Quietly) The war is finally over.

He rings a massive golden bell. The crowd erupts.

---

**SCENE 6** **INT. THE "MAMA ZAINAB" COMMAND CENTER \- DAY**

A high-tech, minimalist office overlooking the harbor. It’s "Apple-store" clean \- glass desks and floating holographic menus showing restaurant growth.

MAMA ZAINAB is in the kitchen, laughing as she feeds the GOOSE a piece of bread. The GHOST sits peacefully on the window sill.

A red phone on the desk rings. Zainab wipes her hands on her apron and answers.

**INTERCUT \- SHANG HONG WONG (PENTHOUSE OFFICE)**

Wong is seen only in silhouette against a massive glass window, looking like the mysterious "Banker."

**SHANG HONG WONG** (On phone) The London branch is asking for more garlic in the sauce. What is your decision, Mama?

**MAMA ZAINAB** Tell them no. In this kitchen, we do it the village way, or not at all.

Wong smiles, hangs up, and looks out at the peaceful sea.

**FADE OUT.**

---
projects.styleSuffix: shot on ARRI Alexa 35, anamorphic 2.39:1, cinematic color grade, warm Mediterranean highlights + cool teal shadows, volumetric haze, photoreal, film grain, no text overlay

shots.description: Slow descent through neon-soaked Hong-Kong-style cityscape. Rain in slow motion. Mob swarms the building below.
shots.cameraNotes: Establishing aerial. Slow descent. Blade Runner 2049 mood.
shots.prompt: Establishing aerial shot, 4 seconds. Cinematic dystopian city at night, torrential rain in slow motion, dense forest of skyscrapers covered in pink, cyan and magenta neon Chinese signage. Camera descends slowly between the towers toward a single illuminated rooftop. Wet reflective streets below. Volumetric fog. Blade Runner 2049 mood. Anamorphic 2.39:1. ARRI Alexa 35, no text or logos visible. Audio: distant thunder, rain, low synth drone. no logos, no readable text, no warped faces, no extra fingers, no duplicated characters, no plastic skin, no AI artifact shimmer, no cartoon style, no anime, no watermark

shots.description: Wong silhouetted at skyscraper edge, wind whipping his coat, neon city glowing far below.
shots.cameraNotes: Low angle hero. Slow push-in. Back three-quarters to camera.
shots.prompt: Cinematic medium-wide, 3 seconds. East-Asian man in his 60s [REF:WongHong.png], silver-streaked hair, weathered face, wearing dark silken warrior robes that billow in heavy wind and rain, standing at the edge of a rain-soaked skyscraper rooftop, neon city glowing far below, back three-quarters to camera, looking down at his own hands. Slow push-in. Anamorphic, shallow depth of field, photoreal, film grain. Audio: rain, wind, faint heartbeat. no logos, no readable text, no warped faces, no extra fingers, no duplicated characters, no plastic skin, no AI artifact shimmer, no cartoon style, no anime, no watermark

shots.description: His scarred hands turning over, rain rinsing blood in the neon glow.
shots.cameraNotes: Extreme close-up insert. Hands only. Neon reflections in the rain droplets.
shots.prompt: Extreme close-up insert, 2 seconds. Scarred, weathered East-Asian male hands turning palm-up in heavy rain on a rain-soaked skyscraper rooftop. Pink and cyan neon light reflects in pooled rainwater on the skin. Slow motion. Anamorphic, shallow DOF, photoreal, film grain. Audio: rain, low heartbeat. no logos, no readable text, no warped faces, no extra fingers, no duplicated characters, no plastic skin, no AI artifact shimmer, no cartoon style, no anime, no watermark

shots.description: Glass-morphic smartphone glowing with ChatGPT interface. Wong's dialogue to the AI.
shots.dialogue:
我厌倦了战争。告诉我... 地球上哪里没有人会来找战士，而食物可以治愈破碎的灵魂？
(I'm done with the war. Tell me... where is the one place on Earth where no one will look for a fighter, and the food can heal a broken soul?)
shots.cameraNotes: Macro insert. Rack focus raindrops → screen. Neon reflections in droplets.
shots.prompt: Macro insert, 4 seconds. A weathered hand holds a sleek glass-morphic smartphone in pouring rain, water beads on the screen. Floating holographic ChatGPT interface glows softly. Slow rack focus from raindrops to the screen. Anamorphic, shallow DOF, neon reflections in droplets, photoreal. Dialogue (Mandarin Chinese, weary male voice, ~60yo): '我厌倦了战争。告诉我... 地球上哪里没有人会来找战士，而食物可以治愈破碎的灵魂？' Audio: rain, holographic UI hum. no logos, no readable text, no warped faces, no extra fingers, no duplicated characters, no plastic skin, no AI artifact shimmer, no cartoon style, no anime, no watermark

shots.description: Mob of suits and street fighters bursting through the rooftop door behind Wong.
shots.dialogue: CHATGPT (V.O.): Searching... Analysis complete. You seek peace and Comfort Food. Go to Egypt.
shots.cameraNotes: Reverse low angle. Wong foreground, door background.
shots.prompt: Cinematic wide, 3 seconds. Reverse low-angle shot. Rooftop in pouring neon rain. In the background, a steel rooftop door bursts open — a mob of suited men and street fighters floods through. In the foreground, the dark silhouette of a warrior-robed man. Tension, threat, urgency. Anamorphic, high contrast, pink-cyan neon color, photoreal. Audio: door crash, shouting, rain. no logos, no readable text, no warped faces, no extra fingers, no duplicated characters, no plastic skin, no AI artifact shimmer, no cartoon style, no anime, no watermark

shots.description: Wong dives backward off the roof edge into the neon glow — dissolves to white.
shots.cameraNotes: Match-cut leap. Camera rushes to edge. White dissolve.
shots.prompt: Cinematic wide, 3 seconds. A warrior-robed East-Asian man takes one step backward off the edge of a rain-soaked skyscraper rooftop, arms slightly open, face calm, neon city a glittering abyss below him. Camera rushes forward to the edge. As he falls, the neon glow overwhelms the frame in a white dissolve. Slow motion. Anamorphic, photoreal, film grain. Audio: silence → swelling synth. no logos, no readable text, no warped faces, no extra fingers, no duplicated characters, no plastic skin, no AI artifact shimmer, no cartoon style, no anime, no watermark

shots.description: 360-degree drone orbit around apex of Great Pyramid. Wong meditating in warrior robes at the summit.
shots.cameraNotes: Hero drone shot. Full 360 orbit. Long shadow. Deep teal sky.
shots.prompt: Cinematic drone orbit, 6 seconds, 360-degree slow circle around the apex of the Great Pyramid of Giza at high noon. Vast Giza desert and distant Cairo skyline shimmer in heat haze. Seated cross-legged on the weathered limestone summit: East-Asian man in his 60s [REF:WongHong.png], silver-streaked hair, dark silken warrior robes rippling in the desert wind, eyes closed in deep meditation, perfectly still. Long shadow. Anamorphic 2.39:1, ARRI Alexa 35, photoreal, warm desert highlights, deep teal sky. Audio: low wind, distant hawk cry, sparse ney flute drone. no logos, no readable text, no warped faces, no extra fingers, no duplicated characters, no plastic skin, no AI artifact shimmer, no cartoon style, no anime, no watermark

shots.description: Wong slowly opens his eyes and raises the glass-morphic phone to the blazing sky.
shots.dialogue: I am in position. Tell me... what is the ultimate strike in this market?
shots.cameraNotes: Low push-in. Desert heat shimmer. Calm authority.
shots.prompt: Cinematic medium close-up, 4 seconds. East-Asian man in his 60s [REF:WongHong.png] seated cross-legged on the Great Pyramid apex, slowly opens his eyes — calm, tactical. He raises a glass-morphic smartphone toward the blazing noon sky. Desert light rims his weathered face. Shallow DOF, heat haze bokeh behind him. Anamorphic, photoreal. Dialogue (Mandarin accent, calm-commanding English): 'I am in position. Tell me... what is the ultimate strike in this market?' Audio: desert wind, distant hawk, AI UI chime. no logos, no readable text, no warped faces, no extra fingers, no duplicated characters, no plastic skin, no AI artifact shimmer, no cartoon style, no anime, no watermark

shots.description: HUD insert — smartphone above pyramid limestone. Holographic Egyptian market data, Alexandria pulsing dot, dish illustrations.
shots.dialogue: CHATGPT (V.O.): Analyzing Egyptian market sentiment... The highest emotional currency in Egypt is Original Home Food.
shots.cameraNotes: Tight OTS. Translucent holographic UI. Sun-drenched, warm rim light.
shots.prompt: Tight over-shoulder, 4 seconds. Same warrior holding a glass-morphic smartphone above the limestone of the pyramid. Translucent holographic UI floats above the screen showing Arabic-language data charts, Egyptian map with pulsing dot on Alexandria, and dish illustrations (mahshi, mombar, macaroni bechamel). Sun-drenched, warm rim light, depth of field shallow. Photoreal. No readable brand text. Audio: quiet electronic AI tone, soft chime. no logos, no readable text, no warped faces, no extra fingers, no duplicated characters, no plastic skin, no AI artifact shimmer, no cartoon style, no anime, no watermark

shots.description: Wong stands. Wind catches his robes like storm clouds against the bright pyramid sky.
shots.cameraNotes: Low angle. Robes billowing. Strong silhouette against blue sky.
shots.prompt: Cinematic low-angle medium, 3 seconds. East-Asian warrior [REF:WongHong.png] rises to standing on the Great Pyramid apex. The desert wind catches his dark silken robes, making them billow dramatically like storm clouds against a vivid blue Egyptian sky. Decisive posture. Anamorphic, strong upward angle, warm backlight, photoreal. Dialogue: 'Mama Zainab. It is decided.' Audio: rising ney flute, desert wind. no logos, no readable text, no warped faces, no extra fingers, no duplicated characters, no plastic skin, no AI artifact shimmer, no cartoon style, no anime, no watermark

shots.description: Wong at pyramid peak, looking north toward the invisible Mediterranean coast. Small dangerous smile.
shots.cameraNotes: Wide back. Robes billow. Looking north. North light.
shots.prompt: Cinematic wide, 3 seconds. From behind: East-Asian warrior in dark robes stands at the very apex of the Great Pyramid, looking north. The vast Egyptian landscape stretches below him. A small, almost imperceptible smile. Wind whips his robes. Anamorphic, golden side-light, deep blue northern sky, photoreal. Dialogue (quiet, to himself): 'The ultimate proving ground...' Audio: rising strings, wind. no logos, no readable text, no warped faces, no extra fingers, no duplicated characters, no plastic skin, no AI artifact shimmer, no cartoon style, no anime, no watermark

shots.description: Wong steps to the edge and dives off the pyramid. Camera rushes to follow — he's already gone, swallowed by a dust devil.
shots.dialogue: Time to find the first Mama Zainab.
shots.cameraNotes: High angle top-down then rush to edge. Dust devil swallows him.
shots.prompt: Cinematic aerial, 4 seconds. From above: East-Asian warrior stands at the very apex of the Great Pyramid and steps off the edge without hesitation. The camera plunges forward to the edge — he is already gone, vanished into a swirling desert dust devil far below. Only wind and ancient stone. CUT TO BLACK. Anamorphic, photoreal, dramatic. Dialogue (voice-over): 'Time to find the first Mama Zainab.' Audio: orchestral sting, dust rush. no logos, no readable text, no warped faces, no extra fingers, no duplicated characters, no plastic skin, no AI artifact shimmer, no cartoon style, no anime, no watermark

shots.description: Mediterranean coastline reveal — giant competition stage with hundreds of cooking stations in an Alexandria grand plaza.
shots.cameraNotes: Sweeping drone. Coastal reveal. Golden hour. Lens flare.
shots.prompt: Sweeping drone shot, 4 seconds. Coastal Alexandria, Egypt at golden hour, the Mediterranean sparkling. Camera flies over the iconic corniche then reveals a massive open-air food competition stage in a grand plaza: dozens of stainless steel cooking stations arranged in rows, each manned by a woman cook, large crowd cheering. Volumetric sun rays, lens flare, anamorphic, photoreal, warm sunset palette. Audio: cheering crowd, oud + light percussion. no logos, no readable text, no warped faces, no extra fingers, no duplicated characters, no plastic skin, no AI artifact shimmer, no cartoon style, no anime, no watermark

shots.description: Wong (now in cream linen suit, calm authority) at judging table with vintage brass microphone. The casting call begins.
shots.dialogue: I have traveled across the world to find the perfect roll. The one who creates the ultimate Sobah Mahshi wins my life's fortune. You will be... our MaMa Zainab. Begin!
shots.cameraNotes: Hero medium. Golden-hour key light. Rows of cooks bokeh'd out behind.
shots.prompt: Cinematic medium, 3 seconds. The same East-Asian man [REF:WongHong.png] now transformed — clean-shaven, hair tied back, wearing a premium minimalist cream-linen suit, standing behind a long judging table, holding a vintage brass microphone. Background: rows of cooks bokeh'd out. Calm authority. Anamorphic, soft golden-hour key light, photoreal. Dialogue (English with thick Mandarin accent, broken Egyptian Arabic mix): 'I have traveled across the world to find the perfect roll. The one who creates the ultimate Sobah Mahshi wins my life's fortune. You will be... our MaMa Zainab. Begin!' Audio: crowd hush, mic feedback, then silence. no logos, no readable text, no warped faces, no extra fingers, no duplicated characters, no plastic skin, no AI artifact shimmer, no cartoon style, no anime, no watermark

shots.description: Tracking shot glides past dozens of women in colorful aprons, rolling grape leaves and stuffed vegetables. Scent of lemon, garlic and mint.
shots.cameraNotes: Long lateral tracking shot. Women working at cooking stations.
shots.prompt: Cinematic lateral tracking shot, 4 seconds. Camera glides slowly along a row of dozens of Egyptian women at stainless steel cooking stations in an open-air plaza. Each woman works with practiced hands: rolling grape leaves, stuffing peppers and zucchini, arranging mahshi. Colorful traditional dress and aprons. Steam and herbs. Golden Mediterranean sunlight. Anamorphic, shallow DOF, warm palette, photoreal.
